case.title: HUNTINGTON v. CITY OF NEW YORK

opinion.h: HUNTINGTON v. CITY OF NEW YORK, 193 U.S. 441 (1904)
ARABELLA D. HUNTINGTON, Appt., v. CITY OF NEW YORK et al. No. 173. Argued March 3, 1904 Decided March 21, 1904
opinion.p: This case is governed by the decision just announced [Barney v. New York, 193 U. S. --, ante, 502, 24 Sup. Ct. Rep. 502], and the decree is accordingly affirmed.
